title: jijifujiji_2024_ResourcePacks
description: This is a specific resource package used in the server, which adds icons to certain items, such as special horns used in the server, strange mushroom fishing rods that can increase player movement speed, and so on.
body:
This is a specific resource package used in the server, which adds icons to certain items, such as special horns used in the server, Warped Fungus on a Stick that can increase player movement speed, and so on.
There are also some weapons as commemorative rewards: swords, axes, picks, hoes, and so on.
This also includes the localization of achievement modules

Welcome to play jijifujiji server. Interested friends can contact me via WeChat: kyouhunter

-



这是一个在服务器中特定使用的特定资源包，为一些项目增加了图标，比如服务器中使用的特殊号角、可以增加玩家移动的诡异菌钓竿等等。
还有一些作为纪念奖励等武器：剑、斧头、镐子、锄头。
欢迎来玩jijifujiji服务器，感兴趣的朋友可以微信联系我：kyouhunter
